# Pinned OBO Graphs 0.3.2 schema

This directory vendors the official JSON Schema generated from the OBO Graphs
0.3.2 Java object model.

- Upstream: <https://github.com/geneontology/obographs>
- Tag: `v0.3.2`
- Revision: `459a44e45b56188912bf7272239c984d94b1af4a`
- Upstream paths: `schema/` and `pom.xml`
- Imported: 2026-07-16
- Upstream terms: BSD 3-Clause, as declared in the exact pinned
  `pom.upstream.xml`; see `LICENSE.md`

The schema JSON, upstream schema README, and Maven POM are copied byte-for-byte.
Pinned SHA-256 digests:

```text
a54a564ff47014b626003e54e6a61392b65be7301939d878cc658d4186e88165  obographs-schema.json
60668223ff53ff9fca59dfc62cb7abada60ba977da8f1ddaf2772631efec528d  subschemas/obographs-graph-schema.json
0a1c6e1b0b446fc6a4515eddc4bf4767156097caf9d7b4c5f1d1ca733e3696a6  subschemas/obographs-meta-schema.json
```

Do not edit these files to accommodate PurRDF output. A refresh must pin a new
upstream release/revision, verify its license declaration, replace the files
byte-for-byte, and update the hashes and production projection together.
